message:
Command `# Step 46 started (new GlobalPlacement attempt). Overflow cycling at ~0.56 
# This is a convergence issue with GRT_ADJUSTMENT=0.2 and density 0.5279
# The previous run had overflow ~241 - let's check if this run is better
# Let's wait more and check the overflow trend
sleep 120
tail -10 /tmp/pnr_gpl.log
echo "---"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/ | sort -V | tail -5` executed with exit code -1.
